name: Suspicious Service Creation Following SMB Binary Transfer to Uncommon Folders
description: Detects suspicious service creation that occurs after the transfer of executable binaries via SMB to uncommon folders, such as C:\Users\Public\. Such behavior may indicate lateral movement and persistence tactics employed by attackers, warranting further investigation.

filterSets.name: Executable File Transfer via SMB to Suspicious Folders

author: Ahmed Kamal & Bahaa Yamany
